info.name: NHID-Clinical API
info.description:
Live conformance API for the NHID-Clinical healthcare voice AI governance standard.

Base URL: https://dc2ipcqs7k.execute-api.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/prod

Routes:
  GET  /health                       — liveness probe (no auth)
  POST /v1/conformance/check         — full conformance check (x-api-key required)
  POST /v1/demo/check                — same as above, no key (rate limited)
  POST /v1/adapters/vapi/check       — native VAPI call payload (no key)
  POST /v1/adapters/twilio/check     — native Twilio call payload (no key)

NHID-Clinical is a voluntary open proposal. CC BY 4.0.

request.description: Liveness probe. No authentication required. Returns policy engine version.
Full conformance check against all NHID-Clinical v1.3 rules. Requires x-api-key header.
Same as /v1/conformance/check but no API key required. Rate-limited. This payload sends a PHI request before disclosure — expect IDG-01 and PDX-01 violations.
POST a native VAPI call payload — no NHID schema knowledge required. Bot requests PHI before disclosing it is automated. Expected: conformant=false, IDG-01 violation.
Bot discloses identity before requesting NPI. Expected: conformant=true, violations=[].
Native Twilio transcript with late disclosure. Expected: conformant=false, IDG-01 violation.
Agent discloses automated identity before requesting NPI. Expected: conformant=true, violations=[].
